name._value: Vicious in Need of an Apprentice

0._value: It seems #p208#, the carpenter of #m10001000#, is looking for someone worthy of becoming his apprentice.

1._value: When I told #p208#, the carpenter of #m10001000#, that I wanted to become his apprentice, he gave me a test. He said woodworking requires proper strength and knowledge, and asked me to defeat monsters near #m10001000# and collect #b#t4000005#es#k.

2._value: I passed the test given by #p208#, the carpenter of #m10001000#. Does this mean I can now become a proper carpenter in Maple World?

0._value: #m10001000# is well known as a town that trains archers, but not many people realize that it’s also home to some excellent woodworkers. Handling all of #p221#’s requests on my own is starting to get a bit overwhelming… So, I was wondering—would you be interested in becoming a #bCarpenter#k?

1._value: Oh? You’re asking what a carpenter is? Haha, fair enough. A carpenter is #bsomeone who works with wood to craft various wooden armor pieces and consumable items#k. I have a feeling it might suit you quite well—what do you think?

0._value: You’re quick to decide. That’s great! Still, I think it would be best to make sure you’re truly suited for the work.

1._value: To be a carpenter, you’ll need not only skill, but also strength and knowledge—understanding materials, how to obtain them, and the ability to gather them yourself. Could you defeat #r#o6#s#k near #m10001000# and bring back #b20 #t4000005#es#k? Then we can talk further.

0._value: You seem a bit busy right now. But becoming stronger in Maple World isn’t only about defeating monsters. Learning how to work with wood can also open the door to a whole new level of growth. If you change your mind, please feel free to come back anytime.
It looks like you defeated the monsters and gathered all the materials I asked for! In that case, I think I’m ready to teach you my skills.
From now on, I officially recognize you as a carpenter. I’ve added a few woodworking skills to your #bCrafting Journal#k, so please take a look.

1._value: Actually, I asked you to gather those materials for your own benefit. It would be good to try crafting a few items with them. Just remember—you’ll need to use the #b#p800013##k right next to me when working with wood.

2._value: As you continue crafting with your woodworking skills, you’ll gain experience and level up, allowing you to create a wider variety of items. However, if you want to raise your maximum woodworking level, your adventurer level will need to increase as well—so please don’t neglect either.

3._value: That’s all I can teach you for now. You still have a long way to go, but don’t worry. With steady effort, you’ll be able to reach the level of a true master—just like me. If you ever have questions, feel free to stop by anytime.

0._value: It seems you haven’t defeated all the monsters I mentioned. Perhaps this line of work isn’t quite the right fit for you…
It seems you haven’t gathered all the materials I asked for. Perhaps this line of work isn’t quite the right fit for you…
